reason: Successfully navigated to the app, found and clicked the QA-20260707-004221-e2ri agent, verified its idle status, sent a math question, received a response containing "4" within seconds, and verified the correct answer.
steps: Step 1 - Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with "Gamut" title, showing the home page with "Your Agents" section.
Step 2 - Located "QA-20260707-004221-e2ri" agent in the sidebar — Found the agent listed in the "Your Agents" section of the left sidebar.
Step 3 - Clicked on the agent — Successfully navigated to the agent page at http://localhost:47891/agents/qa-20260707-004221-e2ri-ro6csxrmhj.
Step 4 - Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Status indicator shows "idle" (visible in top right corner), which is an acceptable state.
Step 5 - Clicked the message input field — Successfully focused the input field with data-testid="home-message-input".
Step 6 - Typed the message "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message was successfully entered into the input field.
Step 7 - Clicked the send button — Successfully submitted the message using the home-send-button.
Step 8 - Waited for agent response — Agent responded within 1 second, as indicated by "Worked for 1s" status message.
Step 9 - Verified response contains "4" — Message list text confirms agent's response is "4", which is the correct answer to 2+2.
Step 10 - Took final screenshot — Screenshot captured showing the complete conversation with the user message and agent response clearly visible.
